issues.title: Layout Thrashing during Render
issues.description: Calling getBoundingClientRect() inside the render body causes synchronous reflow, severely impacting UI responsiveness during state changes.
issues.fix_hint: Move the calculation to useLayoutEffect and store values in state or use CSS variables updated in the effect.

issues.title: Unthrottled Scroll Listener with Forced Reflow
issues.description: The 'upd' function calls getBoundingClientRect and offsetWidth/Height on every scroll event without any throttling or requestAnimationFrame wrapping.
issues.fix_hint: Throttle the scroll listener or use IntersectionObserver/ResizeObserver for cleaner layout tracking.

issues.title: Virtualization Disabled on Large Data Table
issues.description: The main inventory table has virtualization explicitly disabled, which will cause massive DOM bloat and lag when thousands of items are loaded or 'Show All' is clicked.
issues.fix_hint: Set enableVirtualization={true} and ensure the container has a fixed height.

issues.title: Full Icon Library Import
issues.description: Using 'import * as Myna' combined with a dynamic Proxy registry prevents tree-shaking, forcing the entire icons package into the bundle.
issues.fix_hint: Explicitly import only used icons or use a build-time plugin to handle dynamic icon loading.

issues.title: Production Console Logs
issues.description: Non-error console logs and warnings are scattered across the codebase, which can leak internal state and clutter the console in production.
issues.fix_hint: Wrap logs in a dedicated logger service that is disabled in production, or use a Babel/Terser plugin to strip them.

issues.title: Hardcoded Margin Left (Non-logical)
issues.description: Using 'ml-1' instead of 'ms-1' causes incorrect spacing in RTL mode (Arabic).
issues.fix_hint: Change 'ml-1' to 'ms-1'.

issues.title: Hardcoded Left Position
issues.description: Hardcoded 'left-3' position for search icon prevents it from flipping to the right in RTL mode.
issues.fix_hint: Change 'left-3' to 'start-3' or 'inset-inline-start-3'.

issues.title: Hardcoded Text Alignment
issues.description: Explicit 'text-left' prevents proper Arabic alignment.
issues.fix_hint: Change 'text-left' to 'text-start'.

issues.title: Non-logical Margin Auto
issues.description: Using 'ml-auto' forces the element to the right even in RTL, where it should probably be 'ms-auto'.
issues.fix_hint: Change 'ml-auto' to 'ms-auto'.

issues.title: Hardcoded Flex Direction
issues.description: Manual ternary for flex-row-reverse instead of using CSS 'start/end' or logical properties.
issues.fix_hint: Remove ternary and rely on global 'dir' attribute with standard 'flex-row'.

issues.title: Missing Image Alt Text
issues.description: The login logo image is missing an 'alt' attribute, making it invisible to screen readers.
issues.fix_hint: Add a descriptive 'alt' attribute or alt="" if decorative.

issues.title: Interactive Element Missing Role
issues.description: A div with an onClick handler is used as a button but lacks a 'role="button"' and keyboard listeners.
issues.fix_hint: Change to a <button> element or add role="button" and tabIndex="0".

issues.title: Input Missing Label
issues.description: The AI assistant input field has no associated <label> or aria-label, which is problematic for accessibility.
issues.fix_hint: Add an 'id' and a corresponding <label htmlFor={id}> or use 'aria-label'.

issues.title: Missing Associated Label for Branch Search
issues.description: The search input in Branch Settings lacks an accessible name.
issues.fix_hint: Add 'aria-label="Search branches"' to the input.

issues.title: Hardcoded Hex Colors
issues.description: Using raw hex colors like '#94a3b8' bypasses the theme system and makes dark mode adjustments difficult.
issues.fix_hint: Use a CSS variable like 'var(--text-muted)' or a Tailwind class.

issues.title: Hardcoded Pixel Font Size
issues.description: Setting font-size to '16px' explicitly instead of using relative units (rem) or design system tokens.
issues.fix_hint: Use Tailwind text-base or a rem-based utility.

issues.title: Hardcoded Right Padding
issues.description: Using 'pr-20' conditionally instead of logical padding.
issues.fix_hint: Change 'pr-20' to 'pe-20'.

issues.title: Missing Alt Text on Profile Images
issues.description: Navbar profile images lack alt text.
issues.fix_hint: Add alt="Profile" or similar.

issues.title: Absolute Left-0 Positioning
issues.description: Scanner line is pinned to 'left-0' which might cause issues in centered or right-aligned layouts.
issues.fix_hint: Change 'left-0' to 'inset-x-0' if it should cover the full width.

issues.title: Hardcoded Origin for Transitions
issues.description: Using origin-left/right based on isRTL instead of logical origin.
issues.fix_hint: Use 'origin-inline-start' if supported or centralize logic in a utility.

issues.title: Input Missing aria-label (Inventory)
issues.description: Multiple inputs in Inventory management missing accessible names.
issues.fix_hint: Add aria-label or associate with a label.

issues.title: Hardcoded Background Hex
issues.description: Specific background color '#06080F' hardcoded in Mobile Navigation.
issues.fix_hint: Use a theme variable like 'var(--bg-app)'.

issues.title: Hardcoded Right-4 in Onboarding
issues.description: Explicit right-4 for the back button in onboarding.
issues.fix_hint: Change to 'top-4 start-4' and remove the ternary.

issues.title: Hardcoded Left Positioning in Badge
issues.description: Tab bar badge uses hardcoded left calculation.
issues.fix_hint: Use logical 'inset-inline-start' and calculate relative to the parent.

issues.title: Missing Alt on Staff Spotlight
issues.description: Images in the staff spotlight ticker missing alt text.
issues.fix_hint: Add alt={staff.name}.

issues.title: Input Missing Label (Cart Controls)
issues.description: Quantity inputs in POS cart missing labels.
issues.fix_hint: Add aria-label="Quantity".

issues.title: Scattered Z-index Values
issues.description: Z-index '9999' used in multiple places without a centralized scale.
issues.fix_hint: Define a z-index scale in Tailwind config or CSS variables.

issues.title: Hardcoded Hex for Charts
issues.description: Chart colors are hardcoded as hex strings.
issues.fix_hint: Pull colors from a centralized theme config or CSS variables.

issues.title: Missing Alt on Login Audit Images
issues.description: Images in the audit report missing alt text.
issues.fix_hint: Add alt="Device icon".

issues.title: Hardcoded Left Padding (SignUp)
issues.description: Using 'pr-20' and 'text-left' on sign up fields.
issues.fix_hint: Change to 'pe-20 text-start'.

issues.title: Input Missing Label (SecureGate)
issues.description: Security code input missing label.
issues.fix_hint: Add aria-label="Security Code".

issues.title: Hardcoded Right-1 Positioning
issues.description: Notification badge pinned to 'right-1'.
issues.fix_hint: Change to '-end-1'.

issues.title: Interactive Div without Role (POS History)
issues.description: Clickable container for event layer missing role.
issues.fix_hint: Add role="button" to the clickable area.

issues.title: Hardcoded Margin-2
issues.description: Using 'ml-2 mr-2' explicitly.
issues.fix_hint: Change to 'mx-2' or 'ms-2 me-2'.

issues.title: Missing Associated Label (Invite Modal)
issues.description: Email input in invite modal missing label.
issues.fix_hint: Add aria-label="Email address".
